Class Exit

java.lang.Object
evacuation.graph.Node
evacuation.graph.Exit
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Exit extends Node
Represents an evacuation exit node in the graph. An exit has a capacity and can be opened or closed. Agents target exits as their final destination.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Constructs an Exit at the origin with the given capacity.

  • Constructor Details

    • Exit

      public Exit(String id, int capacity)
      Constructs an Exit at the origin with the given capacity.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      capacity - maximum throughput capacity

    • Exit

      public Exit(String id, double x, double y, int capacity)
      Constructs an Exit at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      x - x coordinate
      y - y coordinate
      capacity - maximum throughput capacity

  • Method Details

    • open

      public void open()
      Opens this exit, allowing agents to use it.

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes this exit, preventing agents from using it.

    • isOpen

      public boolean isOpen()
      Returns whether this exit is currently open.
      Returns:
      true if open

      public void setCapacity(int capacity)
